title: Local football to resume this weekend
description: GEORGE NEWS - After a long festive season...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - After a long festive season break, the local soccer teams are getting ready for their first league fixtures of the new year.


> Both the HollywoodBets Regional League and the George Local Football Association League (Geolfa), will resume on Saturday 18 January across the Eden District.


The semi-professional ABC Motsepe Provincial League will start on 25 January. In the regional league two teams from George, Simunye and Black Cats, are currently occupying the top two positions on the log table after playing seven games last year.

Simunye's right wing back, Sithabiso Shabalala, told George Herald they have managed to get a bunch of talented players from different clubs this season and are aiming for a Western Cape ABC Motsepe play-offs spot. But, they are facing tough competition in this league and will have to work hard to stay on top of the league.

Weekend fixtures

Saturday 18 January

Red Eagles vs Voota FC, 10:00 @ Safe Hub

Bitou Young Pirates vs FC United, 10:00 @ Kwanokuthula Stadium

Black Cats vs Moonlight, 10:00 @ Lawaaikamp Stadium

NMU Madibaz vs Fast Eleven 10:00 @ NMU field

Peace Makers vs FC Rebels, 10:00 @ Extension 23 A-field

Benfica vs Smuts United, 10:00 @ Extension 23 C-field

Simunye vs La Liga, 12:00 @ Lawaaikamp Stadium

Sea Birds vs Kabo Yellow, 12:00 @ Extension 23

Red Eagles vs FC United, 14:00 @ Safe Hub

Bitou Young Pirates vs Voota FC, 14:00 @ Kwanokuthula Stadium

Black Cats vs Fast Eleven, 14:00 at Lawaaikamp Stadium

NMU Madibaz vs Moonlight, 14:00 @ NMU

Peace Makers vs Smuts United, 14:00 @ Extension 23

Benfica vs FC Rebels, 14:00 @ Extension 23

Simunye vs Kabo Yellow, 17:00 @ Lawaaikamp

Sea Birds vs La Liga, 17:00 @ Extension 23

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
